permissions.fallback_msg: This skill needs to read local files (e.g., prompt templates, few-shot example datasets, reference docs). Allow?
This skill needs to write files (e.g., saving optimized prompt templates, versioned prompt files, or output artifacts). Allow?
This skill needs to read version-controlled source code files (e.g., prompt scripts or optimization tooling). Allow?
This skill may create or modify versioned source code files for prompts or optimization scripts. Allow?
This skill may execute scripts such as 'scripts/optimize-prompt.py' or run evaluation pipelines. Allow?
This skill may start an interactive Python REPL session to run prompt engineering code examples. Allow?
This skill may execute code inside an interactive REPL session (e.g., prompt template rendering, few-shot selection). Allow?
This skill may read output or state from an active REPL session to evaluate prompt results. Allow?
This skill loads external content such as retrieved context, few-shot examples, and reference documents into the agent session. Allow?
This skill may load or dispatch authored sub-skills (e.g., the prompt template library or optimization scripts). Allow?
